description: 50-record fixture for policy FAQ pipeline accuracy testing (TEST-016, Sprint 13). Covers all 20 supported question keys, room-level and restaurant-level scope hints, unknown questions, multi-question emails, approval_required routing, and no-policy-question emails.

notes.target_resolution: Expected resolution outcomes are based on seed data defaults (see seed_data.py _seed_policy_faqs). Allowed: cake_allowed, candles_allowed, flowers_allowed, children_allowed. Not allowed: pets_allowed. Approval required: decorations_allowed, balloons_allowed, external_performer_allowed, live_music_allowed, dj_allowed, agency_commission. Information only: microphone_available, screen_available, av_available, private_room_available, room_capacity, disabled_access, minimum_spend, room_hire, service_charge. Unknown key: not in DB, goes to human review.

records.subject: Birthday dinner — can we bring candles?
records.body: Hi, we'd like to book a private birthday dinner for 14 people on Saturday 4th July. Can we bring birthday candles to put on the cake? Thanks, Sarah

policy_questions.raw_question: Can we bring birthday candles to put on the cake?

records.subject: Leaving party — external cake
records.body: Hello, I'm organising a leaving party for 25 people on Friday 10th July. Are we allowed to bring a celebration cake from an external bakery? Best wishes, James

policy_questions.raw_question: Are we allowed to bring a celebration cake from an external bakery?

records.subject: Hen party — decorating the room
records.body: Hey! Planning a hen do dinner for 18 ladies on 18th July. Would we be able to put up some decorations in the private room? Things like a personalised banner and some tabletop props? Thanks, Katie
